GREEN vs. USF [SFSC #CGC 05- 440970] - ORDER [PROPOSED] DENYING MOTION/PETITION FOR
TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER AND PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION
VACtienti\101 USF\025 Green\Pleadinas\Order on Iniunction.doc

 
1 ORDER
2 The petition and motion of Plaintiff Holden Green, Esq. (‘Plaintiff’) for a temporary
3 ||restraining order and preliminary injunction came on for hearing before this court on May 26,
4 || 2005, the Honorable Ronald Evans Quidachay presiding. Plaintiff attempted to appear for
5 || argument, but was not permitted to argue because of his failure to comply with Rules of Court
6 || regarding notification to opposing counsel of intent to contest tentative ruling.
7 The court, having read the supporting and opposing papers, with good cause appearing,
8 || orders as follows:
9 IT IS HEREBY ORDERED that the tentative ruling is confirmed:
10 The petition and motion is denied.
11 |}DATED: JUN 1 4 2005 _—_—.
